privileged_info_summary: All three patients are confirmed to be synthetic test data created via the Bahmni seeding script. Emily Chen (BAH000011), Rosa Martinez (BAH000010), and Priya Patel (BAH000005) are programmatically generated patients with identifiers created by the seed_bahmni.py script (line 269: identifier = f'BAH{i+1:06d}'). The task setup creates three conflicting appointments via Bahmni Appointments REST API for these patients at 09:00 AM on tomorrow's date, requiring the agent to reschedule Emily to +1 hour (10:00 AM) and Rosa to +2 hours (11:00 AM) while preserving Priya at the original time slot.
